5. Optional Combat Rules 
Three rolls are made; the rolls are 12, 3 and 1B, The fist and third characters fired upon are missed, but the second one is hit. More Skill Modifiers 
Al skill modifiers are listed on the Combat Modifiers Chart (Fold-Out B). eae 
Each weapon's range is printed on the Weapon Chart (Fold-Out B), No weapon can fire ata greater distance than its range (eg, a laser pistol cannot damage a target farther than 50 meters away) When a character fires ata target, determine whether he is firing at point blank, short, medium or long range. Point-blank range is anything. within 5 meters. Short range is anything that’s no more than one-third of the ‘maximum range away.
